text: {"type":"escalate","finding":"Module-level _org_uuid global state in scraper.py","severity":"Useful","description":"The _org_uuid module-level global in scraper.py requires tests to manually reset it in setUp(). This is fragile and creates hidden coupling between test classes. The operational bug (stale cache on auth errors) is addressed separately by FIX-7 (clearing on 401/403). This ESCALATE is about the architectural question of whether to refactor into instance state.","options":[{"label":"Refactor into instance attribute","solution":"Make _org_uuid an instance attribute on a Scraper class or pass through QuotaServer. Touches scraper.py, server.py, and multiple test files.","pros":"Eliminates global state, easier testing, cleaner architecture","cons":"Moderate refactor crossing module boundaries"},{"label":"Keep as-is","solution":"Accept module-level global as tech debt. Tests handle it correctly today.","pros":"No change, no risk","cons":"Tests must continue manual _org_uuid reset in setUp"}],"recommendation":"Option 2 (Keep as-is). FIX-7 addresses the operational concern. Full refactor can be a future improvement."}
{"type":"user-decision","approach":"Refactor _org_uuid from module-level global to instance attribute on a class. Touches scraper.py, server.py, and test files."}
